arabic: ذَهَبْنَا إِلَى مَحَطَّةِ الْقِطَارِ لِلسَّفَرِ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ أُخْرَى. اشْتَرَيْنَا التَّذَاكِرَ مِنْ آلَةِ الْبَيْعِ الذَّاتِيِّ بِسُهُولَةٍ. انْطَلَقَ الْقِطَارُ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ دُونَ أَيِّ تَأْخِيرٍ. شَاهَدْنَا الْمَنَاظِرَ الطَّبِيعِيَّةَ الْخَلَّابَةَ مِنَ النَّافِذَةِ خِلَالَ الرِّحْلَةِ. يُفَضِّلُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ النَّاسِ التَّنَقُّلَ بِالْقِطَارِ لِأَنَّهُ سَرِيعٌ.
translation: Otišli smo na željezničku stanicu kako bismo otputovali u drugi grad. Karte smo lako kupili na automatu za prodaju. Voz je krenuo u zakazano vrijeme bez ikakvog kašnjenja. Gledali smo prelijepe prirodne pejzaže kroz prozor tokom putovanja. Mnogi ljudi radije putuju vozom jer je brz.
translationEn: We went to the train station to travel to another city. We bought the tickets from the vending machine easily. The train departed at the scheduled time without any delay. We saw the stunning natural scenery from the window during the trip. Many people prefer moving by train because it is fast.
